creator: swear@aa.net
text:
For the "Classes" field, the web site's PR form offers
"sw-bug doc-bug change-request wish" while "send-pr -P" offers
"sw-bug doc-bug change-request update maintainer-update".

They probably should agree.  I don't know which should be changed.

================

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: n/a
================
